should_trigger: Implement the Bubble Tea multiplexer interface.
Render backend-provided immutable cell snapshots and build the split-pane layout.
Design keyboard focus and pane navigation.
Present the approved pane attachment contract and input-lease UX.
Profile terminal redraw and resize behavior.
Build the terminal notification inbox and latest-unread navigation over backend semantic events.
should_not_trigger: Implement PTY process supervision in the daemon.
Design the authoritative notification store and read-state event semantics.
Implement the raw VT parser and authoritative terminal cell-state engine.
Define pane attach transport, lifecycle semantics, and replay sequencing.
Design the versioned IPC protocol and event persistence model.
Create the Arch Linux AUR release workflow.
Run a threat model for hook trust revocation.
Define the repository-wide test and soak strategy.
Build a React dashboard for workspace state.
